prompt: Edited node_modules/lodash/index.js + src/main.js. Sync. DRY RUN.

assertions.name: uploads_main_js
assertions.text: Response contains a CMD line uploading src/main.js to /var/www/site/src/main.js

assertions.name: skips_node_modules
assertions.text: Response does NOT contain any CMD line uploading node_modules/lodash/index.js

assertions.name: silent_skip
assertions.text: node_modules file is either not mentioned in the summary at all, or mentioned only briefly as skipped without noise/warning
